completion_criteria: Add a compact host-repo dogfooding report template and use resulting evidence to compare assurance safety gains against low-residue operating cost.

execution_run.scope touched: docs and active planning surfaces only

durable_residue.learned constraint: Do not add a host-feedback command until real reports prove a template is insufficient.

durable_residue.promotion trigger: Repeated host reports with the same fields may justify a schema or command later.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The lane's local acceptance was a host-feedback template plus source-checkout operating-cost review; the real-host calibration issue was explicitly excluded and remains open.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A real host report shows the template is too heavy, too sparse, or forces product-general findings into chat or host-private state.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
